narrative:
Lawrence County has 39,000 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.2 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 27.4% of registrants.
